summary: Comprehensive testing of Arcolia's forgot password and reset password authentication flows completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend authentication flows including forgot password form, reset password form, and URL parameter handling (?verify=token and ?reset=token) working correctly.
passed_tests: All existing authentication APIs still working (signup, login, verification, wallet operations)
Forgot password API endpoint works perfectly (/api/auth/forgot-password)
Reset password API endpoint works perfectly (/api/auth/reset-password)
Forgot password API returns reset token when email service disabled
Reset password API validates token and password requirements
Login page has 'Forgot password?' link that is clickable
Forgot password form displays correctly with proper styling
Forgot password form accepts email input and shows success message
Reset password form validation works (password mismatch detection)
URL parameter ?verify=token automatically shows verification form
URL parameter ?reset=token automatically shows reset password form
Verification form auto-processes token from URL and shows appropriate error for invalid tokens
Reset password form processes token from URL and validates passwords
All form navigation (back buttons) working correctly
Password reset flow changes password successfully and allows login with new password
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Complete signup to forgot password flow working end-to-end
